nasb.text: But the Levites who went far from Me when Israel went astray, who went astray from Me after their idols, shall bear the punishment for their iniquity.

esv.text: But the Levites who went far from me, going astray from me after their idols when Israel went astray, shall bear their punishment.

cnv.text: 以色列人走迷了路的時候，有利未人遠離我，走迷了路。他們離開我去隨從他們的偶像，他們必擔當自己的罪孽。

ccb.text: “‘以色列人走入歧途时，有些利未人也远离我、追随偶像，他们必须承担自己犯罪的后果。
